faq.question: Can I extract audio from MP4 video files?
faq.answer: Yes. This converter extracts audio from MP4 videos and saves it as an MP3 file.

faq.answer: Yes. The tool is designed to produce a clear MP3 audio file while keeping conversion simple and reliable.

faq.question: Why convert MP4 to MP3?
faq.answer: MP3 files are lightweight, easy to share, and ideal for listening on many devices.

faq.question: Is the conversion secure and online?
faq.answer: Yes. The process is secure, fast, and works directly in your browser with no software installation.

faq.question: How do I get the converted file?
faq.answer: Once the conversion finishes, you can download your MP3 audio file right away.
